paragraph: Enjoy comfort throughout the day with this adjustable footrest that customizes to each person's specific preferences. This footrest helps encourage proper circulation with its tilt and lock design for optimal foot placement. The textured bumps of this footrest help promote stress relief through concentrating on specific pressure points. This Fellowes footrest helps individuals feel less tightness and strain in their feet. Fellowes Standard Footrest offers dual-position height adjustment with a Free-Floating platform that encourages lower leg movement to help reduce fatigue. A textured surface massages the soles of your feet for stress reduction. Product contains 89% post-consumer recycled materials.
bullets: Footrest helps improve circulation while seating at the workstation
The adjustable height makes this the perfect way for you to maximize your comfort
Textured surface massages soles of feet
Dimensions: 3.75"H x 17.63"W x 13.13"D
5-year manufacturer limited warranty
Product contains 89% post-consumer recycled materials
headliner: Enhance seated comfort with this discreet and ergonomically designed Fellowes Standard footrest.

paragraph: Scotch Box Lock Packaging Tape sticks instantly to any box! It has the power of extreme grip to ensure boxes stay securely sealed, even during rough handling. Its new advanced adhesive creates a secure seal over box edges, and its thickness and durability reduces splitting and tearing and makes it easier to find the start of the roll. This tape can be used to seal any type of box, including harder-to-stick to 100% recycled boxes.
bullets: Sticks instantly to any box!
Has the power of extreme grip, giving you confidence your box will stay sealed through rough handling
Designed for better box adhesion
Guaranteed to Stay Sealed* (If your box does not stay sealed, 3M will refund the purchase price of this tape. Proof of purchase required
New advanced adhesive creates a secure seal over box edges & seams
Easy to find the start of the roll
Can be used on any box, including harder-to-stick-to 100% recycled boxes
No slivering, splitting or tearing
Crystal clear and clear-to-core
Premium sticking power
Smooth unwind & quiet release
You don't need layers of tape for a secure seal - One strip and it ships!
Includes refillable dispenser that delivers a clean cut, and fall-back tabs helps ensure the tape doesn’t fall back on the roll
Strong, durable, solvent-free hot melt adhesive seals and protects

dummyKey.title: Newell Sistema To Go Salad Container, Clear, 37 oz. (21356ZS)

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: The Sistema Salad To Go set features a divided insert tray and a dressing container in the center with a lid, so you can keep ingredients separate until you're ready to eat. The generously sized base is perfect for mixing up your salads, while the convenient knife and fork clip into the lid, so you don't have to carry separate cutlery. It's top-rack dishwasher safe, microwave safe without the lid, and freezer safe.
bullets: Divided insert tray plus a lidded dressing container to keep ingredients separate
Features the distinctive Sistema easy-locking clips and flexible seal; great for meal prep
Top-rack dishwasher safe, microwave safe without the lid, and freezer safe; phthalate- and BPA-free
Fun, colorful containers are designed and made in New Zealand
Colors received may vary
